Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted in part, and denied in part, as follows:
1. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion To Compel Further Answers to Special Interrogatories (Set No. 1) is denied as to Special Interrogatories no. 47, 54, 61, 68, 82, 89, 96, 103, and 110;
2. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion To Compel Further Answers to Special Interrogatories (Set No. 1) is granted as to all other interrogatories specified in defendant's motion;
3. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion To Compel Further Answers to Form Interrogatory No. 17.1 is granted as to sub-parts (b), (c), and (d) of that interrogatory;
4. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified responses in accordance with this order within seven days of the date of the court's order.
Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is denied, subject to reconsideration in the event of non-compliance with this order. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.
